narrative:
Willoughby City has 16,766 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.8% D−R vs -1.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
